##NAMES=Fettelite
##RRUFFID=R110042
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[Ag_6_As_2_S_7_][Ag_10_HgAs_2_S_8_]
##LOCALITY=Nieder-Beerbach mine near Darmstadt, Odenwald, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Institute of Mineralogy, University of Heidelberg
##DESCRIPTION=Red hexagonal plates, type-sample. Analysis of this sample is reported in Bindi et al (2012)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110042
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ag_16.08_Cu_0.13_Fe_0.01_Hg_0.71_As_3.80_S_15.28_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 15.058 b: 15.058 c: 15.576 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 3059 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
